regions.text: Every statement or question in this book has one or more of these sixteen words in it: be, come, give, make, have, go, get, send, do, put, keep, see, seem, take, let, say.

The first of these words, BE, comes into more statements than any other. Here it is. It goes like this: Past, Present, Future. I was, am, will be. He/She/It was, is, will be. We/You/They were, are, will be.
